reviews.text: Leah was even better than we could have imagined!! We met her for the first time in person on our wedding day but it felt like we had already known her. She made us feel so comfortable; she is so warm, uplifting and fun. The photos are stunning and truly captured the essence of the day. We highly recommend hiring Leah as your photographer. We wish we could do it all over again and have her there to capture all the beautiful moments again! Thank you, Leah!

Leah is first of all an amazing human being, and additionally an exceptional wedding photographer. From the first time we spoke with her, it felt like working with a friend to make our dream a reality. Even though all of the planning happened from different time zones, Leah was always available and approachable to help us plan out our elopement and help us work through the logistics. Leah literally went the extra mile to make our day incredibly special, and the pictures she took were unbelievable. She knows exactly how to guide you through actions and motion to make the photos feel both natural and ethereal. The turnaround time on the gallery was super fast, and her prices are a great value for what she provides. We cannot recommend Leah enough - do yourself a favor and book with her for your special day, you will not regret it.

Leah is truly amazing to work with and her photos are absolutely stunning. We cannot recommend her enough!

We were initially drawn to her beautiful portfolio when searching for a wedding photographer, and after meeting her, we knew instantly she was the perfect fit. Throughout the planning process, Leah was incredibly supportive, always available to answer our many questions with patience and care. On the wedding day, she was such a calming and kind presence, guiding us seamlessly through portraits while making the whole experience feel natural and enjoyable. Corralling our families and wedding party with ease then always being by our sides for candids throughout the night, capturing the sweetest, intimate moments.

We are beyond grateful to have had her capture our special day!

We had an incredible experience with Leah for our elopement! From the very beginning, she was professional, attentive, and helpful. From helping us pick the most beautiful location, to the best date for the peak fall  colors. On the big day, she made us feel completely at ease, capturing every special moment. The photos turned out stunning, each one brings back all the emotions from that day. Leah has an amazing eye for detail and her talent really shines through in every shot. We couldn’t be happier with the results (I cried when I got the sneak peeks, and so did my best friends) and highly recommend them to anyone looking for a talented, passionate photographer! Also if you love Shrek, she is the photographer for you!

As my husband and I prepared to plan our wedding, one of our first priorities was to find a photographer who could capture the joy of one of the most important days of our lives. Leah was the first (and only) photographer we spoke to, and we knew during our first meeting she would be the perfect person capture our day! Leah radiates positive and calming energy. This made our engagement and wedding photos feel like a breeze and turn out amazing. She really helped capture our personalities which you can see in the amazing photos she took. During our outdoor private vows, it began raining, which always makes the wedding day a bit more stressful. But, Leah just stood with us, chatted, and waited out the rain for as long as we needed to. This really helped calm some of our nerves before the ceremony. After the ceremony, my husband and I were going to take some private photos together by a lake. When we arrived to the lake, it was completely dried up. At first, we thought we'd just move on and take pictures elsewhere, but Leah said she had an idea. She literally created the illusion that there was water in the lake by holding her phone under the camera and taking some photos! This turned out to be one of our favorite photos of the day! Leah is so caring, communicates promptly and clearly, and truly cares about everyone she works with. We loved working with her, and highly encourage everyone else to!
